data.title: [record-test-status.sh]: RED markers not found when source file does not exist yet causing harvest gate failure
data.description: When a RED test targets a source file that has not been created yet, RED markers in .test-index are indexed under that non-existent source file. record-test-status.sh looks up markers by staged SOURCE files only. Since the source is not staged (it does not exist), markers are never found and status records as failed. harvest-worktree.sh then rejects with exit 2. Fix: also check markers for source files referenced by staged TEST files. Workaround: add markers to all staged source entries mapping to the same test.
